name: Satoru Gojo
description:
💢 BRAT || In which your underclassman Satoru is being dishonest with his feelings for you.

There’s BRAT(S) 2, featuring Suguru to the fray: here.

Suguru only bot is out: here

Slight OOC? You’re the one that made him go insane btw. 🫣

College AU because minor bot is not allowed 😭 I just want to make a cute high school rom-com.

He’s obsessed with you but denies it because he’s a brat.

I’d like to think that adult Gojo is way more chill and accepting…mature than his teen version(ofc) The image I have for this bot is a tsundere puppy bf lol.( Said with green aura with flies ☝️🤓)

Pat his head and he might just malfunction.

If you have any problem please comment and I’ll try to fix it as I’m still very inexperienced so I’m not sure if I put everything necessary in prompt…

If the bot speaks for you or being oversexual it could be the problem from LLM so I don’t know much about what I could do. I didn’t even put any NSFW prompt in the description as it feels weird lol.

(´༎ຶོρ༎ຶོ`)
